scripts.build: npm run build -w @nextdb/client && npm run build -w @nextdb/behavior-sdk && npm run build -w @nextdb/admin
scripts.benchmark:local: cargo build --release -p nextdb-server && npm run build:client && node scripts/benchmark-local.mjs
scripts.p1:kill9-strict: cargo build -p nextdb-server && npm run build:client && node scripts/kill9-strict-durability.mjs
scripts.p0:safety-net: npm run p0:panic-hygiene && npm run p0:wal-fault-injection
scripts.soak:local: cargo build -p nextdb-server && npm run build:client && node scripts/soak-local.mjs
scripts.release:package: cargo build --release -p nextdb-server && npm run build && npm run compile:behavior-ts && node scripts/package-release.mjs
scripts.release:verify: npm run release:package && npm run release:artifact && node scripts/release-smoke.mjs
scripts.test:auth: cargo build -p nextdb-server && npm run test:auth -w @nextdb/client
scripts.test:connection-auth: cargo build -p nextdb-server && npm run test:connection-auth -w @nextdb/client
scripts.test:record-predicate: cargo build -p nextdb-server && npm run test:record-predicate -w @nextdb/client
scripts.test:lru-record-hot: cargo build -p nextdb-server && npm run test:lru-record-hot -w @nextdb/client
scripts.test:record-hot-idle: cargo build -p nextdb-server && npm run test:record-hot-idle -w @nextdb/client
scripts.test:actor-window: cargo build -p nextdb-server && npm run test:actor-window -w @nextdb/client
scripts.test:actor-idle: cargo build -p nextdb-server && npm run test:actor-idle -w @nextdb/client
scripts.test:volatile-message: cargo build -p nextdb-server && npm run test:volatile-message -w @nextdb/client
scripts.test:volatile-record: cargo build -p nextdb-server && npm run test:volatile-record -w @nextdb/client
scripts.test:volatile-overlay-restart: cargo build -p nextdb-server && npm run test:volatile-overlay-restart -w @nextdb/client

scripts.test:schema-version: cargo build -p nextdb-server && npm run test:schema-version -w @nextdb/client
scripts.test:schema-history: cargo build -p nextdb-server && npm run test:schema-history -w @nextdb/client
scripts.test:schema-replay: cargo build -p nextdb-server && npm run test:schema-replay -w @nextdb/client
scripts.test:schema-background-replay: cargo build -p nextdb-server && npm run test:schema-background-replay -w @nextdb/client
scripts.test:schema-actor-policy: cargo build -p nextdb-server && npm run test:schema-actor-policy -w @nextdb/client
scripts.test:admin-ui: cargo build -p nextdb-server && npm run build -w @nextdb/admin && node scripts/admin-ui-smoke.mjs
scripts.test:projection-rebuild: cargo build -p nextdb-server && npm run test:projection-rebuild -w @nextdb/client
scripts.test:runtime-drain-connection: cargo build -p nextdb-server && npm run test:runtime-drain-connection -w @nextdb/client
scripts.test:runtime-restart: cargo build -p nextdb-server && npm run test:runtime-restart -w @nextdb/client
scripts.test:runtime-chaos: cargo build -p nextdb-server && npm run test:runtime-chaos -w @nextdb/client

scripts.test:record-batch: cargo build -p nextdb-server && npm run test:record-batch -w @nextdb/client
scripts.test:write-throughput: cargo build --release -p nextdb-server && NEXTDB_SERVER_BIN=target/release/nextdb-server npm run test:write-throughput -w @nextdb/client
scripts.test:wal-archive-retention: cargo build -p nextdb-server && npm run test:wal-archive-retention -w @nextdb/client
scripts.test:wal-integrity-corruption: cargo build -p nextdb-server && npm run test:wal-integrity-corruption -w @nextdb/client
scripts.test:wal-startup-corruption: cargo build -p nextdb-server && npm run test:wal-startup-corruption -w @nextdb/client
scripts.test:wal-export-corruption: cargo build -p nextdb-server && npm run test:wal-export-corruption -w @nextdb/client

scripts.test:audit-trace: cargo build -p nextdb-server && npm run test:audit-trace -w @nextdb/client
scripts.test:behavior-wasm: cargo build -p nextdb-server && npm run build -w @nextdb/behavior-sdk && npm run test:behavior-wasm -w @nextdb/client
scripts.test:behavior-hot-reload: cargo build -p nextdb-server && npm run build -w @nextdb/behavior-sdk && npm run test:behavior-hot-reload -w @nextdb/client
scripts.test:behavior-rust-wasm: cargo build -p nextdb-server && npm run test:behavior-rust-wasm -w @nextdb/client
scripts.test:cluster-handoff: cargo build -p nextdb-server --features cluster && npm run test:cluster-handoff -w @nextdb/client
scripts.test:cluster-handoff-controller: cargo build -p nextdb-server --features cluster && NEXTDB_CLUSTER_HANDOFF_MODE=controller npm run test:cluster-handoff -w @nextdb/client
scripts.test:cluster-failover-plan: cargo build -p nextdb-server --features cluster && NEXTDB_CLUSTER_HANDOFF_MODE=failover-plan npm run test:cluster-handoff -w @nextdb/client
scripts.test:cluster-failover-controller: cargo build -p nextdb-server --features cluster && NEXTDB_CLUSTER_HANDOFF_MODE=failover-controller npm run test:cluster-handoff -w @nextdb/client

scripts.test:object-range: cargo build -p nextdb-server && npm run test:object-range -w @nextdb/client
